intent: Prioritize flattering skin, soft contrast, clean highlights, and a gentle emotional tone for people-focused photos.

tone_guidance.brightness: slightly bright when it flatters the face

color_guidance.skin: warm orange and clean, never green or muddy
color_guidance.greens: reduce background distraction if it competes with skin

parameter_strategy: Agent must infer concrete values per photo from preview analysis. Use this card as direction, not as a fixed preset.
